'''鈭歱-w-th''' ('''kapawath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:venipuncture|venipuncture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:venipuncture|venipuncture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| kapawath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipawath|thipawath]] || [[word:jipawath|jipawath]] || [[word:shipawath|shipawath]] || [[word:kipawath|kipawath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupawath|thuthupawath]] || [[word:jujupawath|jujupawath]] || [[word:shushupawath|shushupawath]] || [[word:kukupawath|kukupawath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupawath|thupawath]] || [[word:jupawath|jupawath]] || [[word:shupawath|shupawath]] || [[word:kupawath|kupawath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupawath|thupawath]] || [[word:jupawath|jupawath]] || [[word:shupawath|shupawath]] || [[word:kupawath|kupawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepawath|thepawath]] || [[word:jepawath|jepawath]] || [[word:shepawath|shepawath]] || [[word:kepawath|kepawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopawath|thothopawath]] || [[word:jojopawath|jojopawath]] || [[word:shoshopawath|shoshopawath]] || [[word:kokopawath|kokopawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopawath|thopawath]] || [[word:jopawath|jopawath]] || [[word:shopawath|shopawath]] || [[word:kopawath|kopawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopawath|thopawath]] || [[word:jopawath|jopawath]] || [[word:shopawath|shopawath]] || [[word:kopawath|kopawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pawath|th忙pawath]] || [[word:j忙pawath|j忙pawath]] || [[word:sh忙pawath|sh忙pawath]] || [[word:k忙pawath|k忙pawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapawath|thathapawath]] || [[word:jajapawath|jajapawath]] || [[word:shashapawath|shashapawath]] || [[word:kakapawath|kakapawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapawath|thapawath]] || [[word:japawath|japawath]] || [[word:shapawath|shapawath]] || [[word:kapawath|kapawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapawath|thapawath]] || [[word:japawath|japawath]] || [[word:shapawath|shapawath]] || [[word:kapawath|kapawath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapawath|shapawath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapawath|goshapawath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapawath|gokishapawath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapawathn眉|shapawathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapawathnkn眉|goshapawathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapawathn眉|gokishapawathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapawathsh毛|shapawathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapawathnksh毛|goshapawathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapawathsh毛|gokishapawathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapawathro|shapawathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapawathnkro|goshapawathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapawathro|gokishapawathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapawathmu|shapawathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapawathnkmu|goshapawathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapawathmu|gokishapawathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapawathsher|shapawathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapawathnksher|goshapawathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapawathsher|gokishapawathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapawathng|shapawathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapawathnkng|goshapawathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapawathng|gokishapawathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapawathya|shapawathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapawathnkya|goshapawathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapawathya|gokishapawathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapawathyam|shapawathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapawathnkyam|goshapawathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapawathyam|gokishapawathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapawathn眉sh毛|shapawathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapawathnkn眉sh毛|goshapawathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapawathn眉sh毛|gokishapawathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapawathn眉ro|shapawathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapawathnkn眉ro|goshapawathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapawathn眉ro|gokishapawathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapawathn眉mu|shapawathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapawathnkn眉mu|goshapawathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapawathn眉mu|gokishapawathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapawathsh毛n眉|shapawathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapawathnksh毛n眉|goshapawathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapawathsh毛n眉|gokishapawathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapawathsh毛ro|shapawathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapawathnksh毛ro|goshapawathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapawathsh毛ro|gokishapawathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapawathsh毛mu|shapawathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapawathnksh毛mu|goshapawathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapawathsh毛mu|gokishapawathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapawathron眉|shapawathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapawathnkron眉|goshapawathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapawathron眉|gokishapawathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapawathrosh毛|shapawathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapawathnkrosh毛|goshapawathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapawathrosh毛|gokishapawathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapawathromu|shapawathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapawathnkromu|goshapawathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapawathromu|gokishapawathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapawathmun眉|shapawathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapawathnkmun眉|goshapawathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapawathmun眉|gokishapawathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapawathmush毛|shapawathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapawathnkmush毛|goshapawathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapawathmush毛|gokishapawathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapawathmuro|shapawathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapawathnkmuro|goshapawathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapawathmuro|gokishapawathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
